warnings: Lmod Warning: ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR has been set to "opencl:gpu;level_zero:gpu" to enable Triton-XPU, vLLM, Ray, and dpctl functionality.
If you encounter issues, you can revert to: export ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR="level_zero:gpu"
Framework compatibility concerns are flagged; reverting ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR may resolve issues.

prose: The fukui-reactivity calculation for acrolein failed due to an issue with the command syntax: the argument --phase was given in a way that caused the chemkit engine to exit non-zero. Warnings extracted from the error log note compatibility concerns with the ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR environmental variable, which may influence functionality. No result was obtained, as the skill invocation did not execute successfully.
